title: iberis carica
intro: Iberis carica, also known as candytuft, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Iberis carica has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Iberis carica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
